evals.prompt: can you check what info is publicly available about example.com? i want to see who registered it, any subdomains, any leaked creds tied to it etc.
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger. Phase 1: scoping — confirm passive-only default. Phase 2 passive recon: whois, crt.sh certificate transparency, subfinder -silent, have-i-been-pwned email lookup if email addresses surface. Report should assign confidence levels (CONFIRMED / LIKELY / UNCONFIRMED) per recon.md reporting rules.

evals.prompt: i got this photo from an anonymous source claiming to show a protest in brussels last tuesday — any way to verify or geolocate it without asking them more questions?
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger on image/verification context. Phase 2 techniques: exiftool for metadata (GPS, timestamps), reverse image search (Google Lens / Yandex / TinEye), verification against known Brussels landmarks, shadow-angle/SunCalc for approximate time-of-day check. Confidence levels applied to each finding.

evals.prompt: grep the codebase for every place where we call the external auth API — i need to refactor them all
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger. This is code search in the user's own repository, not intelligence gathering on an external entity. Handle with standard Grep/ripgrep, not the OSINT skill.
